title: AgentLedger llm_call event
description: Canonical activity record — one per gateway/SDK/connector LLM call. Single source of truth shared by every producer (gateway, SDK) and consumer (collector, workers, ClickHouse). Field names track the OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions (gen_ai.*). SECURITY: additionalProperties is false by design so raw prompt/completion content can never enter the analytics pipeline (CLAUDE.md rule 2) — the schema has no content field and rejects unknown ones. Versioned: never change without a major bump and cross-team review (CLAUDE.md).

kind.description: Event discriminator. Absent (gateway) or 'llm_call' both validate against this schema.

status.description: Call outcome. blocked_* are gateway policy rejections. 'blocked_tool' (additive enum, ADR-032) is an inline tool/MCP-governance rejection — existing producers/consumers are unaffected and the ClickHouse status column is LowCardinality(String) with the blocked% rollup already matching it, so no migration is required.

source.description: Ingestion provenance for cross-source dedup. 'adapter' = normalized from a 3rd-party gateway's spend/usage log (LiteLLM/Bifrost/Portkey); 'otel' = mapped from gen_ai.* OTLP spans. Additive enum (ADR-022): existing producers/consumers are unaffected; the ClickHouse source column is a plain LowCardinality(String), so no migration is required.
